title: Reconnect triggers automatic sync of pending edits

testCases.given: the client is offline with 3 pending edits queued
testCases.then: all 3 edits are uploaded within 30 seconds and the queue is empty
testCases.notes: Use the Cloudflare emulator with a forced offline window.

testCases.given: the client is online with no pending edits
the client is offline and the user creates a new note
testCases.when: the user closes the tab without reconnecting
testCases.then: the pending edit survives the next session and uploads on reconnect
